label: Open menu (hamburger)
expected_behavior: Toggles #mobileNav .open and animates the three bars into an X (toggleMobileNav in 72f02d79d0.js); reveals the mobile nav drawer.
notes: Visible only at <=1024px via CSS; handler always bound. Note: index.html loads 479bd49556.js + 72f02d79d0.js, both bind hamburger/mobileNav.

label: Services (nav dropdown)
expected_behavior: On desktop (>900px) preventDefault + toggles .dropdown.open to reveal the Services mega-menu, closing any other open dropdown (nav-faq.js).
notes: Reveals ~21 service/storm sub-links (lines 774-794). Those child links are plain <a> navigations to /services/* and /storm-*; representative, not individually enumerated.

label: Free Estimate → (nav CTA)
expected_behavior: Smooth-scrolls to the #contact lead form section (smooth-scroll handler in 72f02d79d0.js intercepts a[href^='#']).
notes: Primary conversion CTA. Repeated as hs-btn (1551), hero CTA (1157), and footer link.

label: Instant Estimate (nav)
expected_behavior: Navigates to /estimate (the interactive estimate-funnel page).
notes: Plain navigation; no JS handler.

label: Call Joe — (859) 420-7382
expected_behavior: Opens the device dialer for (859) 420-7382 (tel: link, no JS).
notes: Repeats many times (hero, sidebar hs-phone, contact section, footer, mobile-cta-call); one representative recorded.

label: Text (mobile sticky CTA)
expected_behavior: Opens the device SMS composer to +18594207382 (sms: link, no JS).
notes: Sticky mobile bar; visible on small viewports.

label: Pick a Time Online →
expected_behavior: Opens cal.com/nobigdeal/roof-inspection booking page in a new tab (target=_blank).
notes: Cross-origin embed/redirect; Brave-iframe note in memory applies if embedded.

label: First Name
expected_behavior: Text field; value read as 'first' by submitForm(); required (first name + phone are the only enforced fields).
notes: Part of the homepage contact/estimate lead form.

label: Last Name
expected_behavior: Text field; value read as 'last' by submitForm() and concatenated into the name field.
notes: Optional (not validated).

label: Phone
expected_behavior: tel input; required — submitForm() alerts if first name or phone is empty.

label: Email
expected_behavior: email input; value read as 'email' by submitForm(), defaults to '(not provided)' if blank.

label: Property Address / Zip
expected_behavior: Text input; value read as 'address' by submitForm(), defaults to '(not provided)' if blank.

label: Service Needed
expected_behavior: Dropdown of 7 service options; value read as 'service' by submitForm() and used in the email subject line; required attr present (only first+phone enforced in JS).
notes: Options: Roof Replacement/Repair, Siding Replacement/Repair, Gutter Replacement, Storm Damage, Other.

label: Tell Me About Your Project
expected_behavior: Textarea; value read as 'message' by submitForm(), defaults to '(no message)' if blank.

label: Leave blank (honeypot)
expected_behavior: Off-screen honeypot; if filled, submitForm() logs 'Bot detected' and aborts submission.
notes: Anti-spam; position:absolute left:-9999px. Should never be filled by a human.

label: Get My Free Estimate →
expected_behavior: Submits the contact form: validates first+phone, fires window._captureContactLead (Firestore backup), POSTs FormData to formsubmit.co/jd@nobigdealwithjoedeal.com, then hides #formFields and shows #formSuccess (submitForm in 72f02d79d0.js).
notes: DANGER:send — dispatches an email lead to Joe via formsubmit.co + writes Firestore lead. Drive only to confirm boundary. Success reveals #formSuccess (index.html:1489).

label: ↑ (back to top)
expected_behavior: Smooth-scrolls window to top (f222a147d2.js); .visible toggled on by scroll handler past 400px (72f02d79d0.js:48).

label: Service-area city tag (e.g. Cincinnati, OH)
expected_behavior: Navigates to the per-city service-area page /areas/<city> (plain anchor).
notes: Repeats ~25x (lines 1263-1292), one per city; representative row. Plus 'View All 25+ Cities' → /areas/ (line 1295).

label: Service card (e.g. Roof Replacement)
expected_behavior: Full-card anchor navigating to the /services/<service> detail page (old pre-fill intercept removed per 72f02d79d0.js comment).
notes: Repeats per service card (lines 1047-1109); representative row.

label: Are you a contractor or entrepreneur? → NBD Pro
expected_behavior: Navigates to /pro/ (the NBD Pro CRM landing).
notes: Footer cross-link to the SaaS product.

label: Address autocomplete input
expected_behavior: Address text input; debounced typing populates #acDrop suggestions; validateStep(1) requires >=5 chars before Continue advances.
notes: Step 1 of the estimate funnel.

label: Address suggestion item
expected_behavior: Clicking a suggestion calls selectAddr(idx) (4053149b2f.js:244) to set the chosen address and dismiss the dropdown.
notes: Dynamically injected; repeats per suggestion. Delegated via .ac-item[data-idx].

label: Continue → (step 1)
expected_behavior: goToStep(2): validates address, hides all .step, loads satellite imagery, shows #step2 (4053149b2f.js:107).

label: Yes, this is my home →
expected_behavior: goToStep(3): advances to the project-details step showing service/size/timeline tile groups.
notes: Step 2 confirms satellite image.

label: ← Different address (back)
expected_behavior: goToStep(1): returns to the address step (back nav, no validation since step<current).
notes: Back buttons repeat on steps 3/4/5 (data-step=2/3/4); representative row.

label: Service tile (Roof Replacement / Repair / Siding / Gutters / Storm)
expected_behavior: selectTile(el,'service'): marks the tile .selected within its group, stores funnelData.service, and reveals #roofTypeGroup when roof-replacement is chosen (4053149b2f.js:373).
notes: 5 service tiles (lines 558-582); choosing roof-replacement reveals the hidden #roofTypeGroup (estimate.html:586).

label: Roof material tile (Asphalt / Metal / Flat / Not Sure)
expected_behavior: selectTile(el,'roofType'): sets funnelData.roofType; group is display:none until the service tile reveal logic shows it.
notes: CONDITIONAL/HIDDEN group (style=display:none initial). Asphalt pre-selected.

label: Home-size tile (Small / Typical / Large / Not Sure)
expected_behavior: selectTile(el,'homeSize'): sets funnelData.homeSize which maps to roof squares used in the ballpark calc (4053149b2f.js:82).
notes: 'Typical' pre-selected.

label: Timeline tile (ASAP / Few Weeks / 1-3 Months / Exploring)
expected_behavior: selectTile(el,'timeline'): sets funnelData.timeline; required to enable #btnStep3 (See My Estimate).
notes: 4 timeline tiles (lines 641-660).

label: See My Estimate →
expected_behavior: goToStep(4): validates step-3 selections, runs calculateBallpark(), and shows the ballpark price step. Disabled until required tiles chosen.
notes: Starts disabled.

label: Unlock My Detailed Estimate →
expected_behavior: goToStep(5): advances to the contact/phone-verification step.
notes: Step 4 shows the ballpark price gate.

label: First Name (estimate contact)
expected_behavior: Text input; value stored to funnelData.firstName in submitAndGetEstimate() (4053149b2f.js:696).

label: Last Name (estimate contact)
expected_behavior: Text input; value stored to funnelData.lastName in submitAndGetEstimate().

label: Phone Number (estimate contact)
expected_behavior: tel input; sendVerificationCode() requires exactly 10 digits (strips non-digits) before sending an OTP, else flags has-error.
notes: Phone is verified via Twilio Verify OTP before submit.

label: Send Code
expected_behavior: sendVerificationCode(): validates 10-digit phone, calls window._sendOTP('+1'+phone) -> sendVerificationCode Cloud Function (Twilio Verify), reveals #otpSection. If CONFIG.OTP_ENABLED is false it auto-verifies (4053149b2f.js:550).
notes: DANGER:send — triggers a real SMS OTP via Twilio. Drive only to confirm boundary.

label: OTP digit input (6 boxes)
expected_behavior: Six single-digit numeric inputs; entering the 6-digit code triggers verification via window._verifyOTP (verifyCode Cloud Function) to set _otpVerified.
notes: CONDITIONAL: #otpSection is display:none until Send Code succeeds. 6 boxes; representative row.

label: Email Address (estimate contact)
expected_behavior: email input; value stored to funnelData.email and used for abandoned-funnel recovery (_saveFunnelProgress) + final lead.

label: TCPA consent checkbox
expected_behavior: Checkbox feeding checkSubmitReady(); must be checked (with OTP verified) to enable #btnSubmit.
notes: Required for SMS/contact consent compliance.

label: Get My Free Detailed Estimate →
expected_behavior: submitAndGetEstimate(): captures contact fields, marks funnel-recovery complete, saves the lead via window._saveLead/submitPublicLead('estimate'), notifies Joe (_notifyJoe), and advances to the loading/results step (4053149b2f.js:691).
notes: DANGER:send — writes a real public lead + notifies Joe (email/SMS). Disabled until OTP verified + TCPA checked. Drive only to confirm boundary.

label: Tier tab (Good / Better / Best)
expected_behavior: switchTier(tier): toggles .active on the chosen tier tab and updates the displayed result price/details (4053149b2f.js:908).
notes: 3 tabs (Good 3-Tab / Better Architectural pre-active / Best Designer); shown only on the results step.

label: Send to My Email →
expected_behavior: emailEstimate(): tracks the CTA and composes an estimate summary (tier price ranges for the address) to send/email the result (4053149b2f.js:954).
notes: DANGER:send — emails the estimate. Drive only to confirm boundary.

label: ↺ Start over with a new address
expected_behavior: resetFunnel(): clears addressInput, deselects all tiles, resets funnel state, and returns to step 1 focusing the address input (4053149b2f.js:992).

label: Open menu (estimate page hamburger)
expected_behavior: Toggles #mobileNav .open (estimate page mobile nav handler in 479bd49556.js).
notes: Shared tool-nav across marketing pages.

label: Your Name (inspect)
expected_behavior: Text input, required; gathered by gatherFormData() and submitted via submitPublicLead('inspect') (inspect-form.js:38).
notes: /inspect QR-funnel lead form.

label: Property Address (inspect)
expected_behavior: Text input, required; gathered as 'address' and submitted via submitPublicLead('inspect').

label: Phone (inspect)
expected_behavior: tel input, required; gathered as 'phone' and submitted via submitPublicLead('inspect').

label: Email (inspect, optional)
expected_behavior: email input, optional; gathered as 'email' and submitted via submitPublicLead('inspect').

label: What happened? (inspect, optional)
expected_behavior: Textarea, optional; gathered as 'story' and submitted via submitPublicLead('inspect').

label: Photos (inspect, optional multiple)
expected_behavior: Multiple image file input; gatherFormData() sends photoCount + comma-joined photoNames (capped 1900 chars) rather than the binaries (inspect-form.js:45).
notes: Files themselves not uploaded — only names/count are sent.

label: Request Free Inspection
expected_behavior: Submits the inspect form: stamps UTM hidden fields, POSTs via submitPublicLead('inspect'), then hides the form and reveals #inspectSuccess; on failure re-enables the button and shows an inline error (inspect-form.js:90).
notes: DANGER:send — writes a real public lead. UTM params (utm_source/medium/campaign hidden inputs lines 158-160) auto-stamped from URL on load. Drive only to confirm boundary.

label: (859) 420-7382 (inspect call button)
expected_behavior: Opens the device dialer for (859) 420-7382 (tel: link, no JS).
notes: Also repeated as hero .phone-cta (line 147).

label: Homeowner's Name (free-roof)
expected_behavior: Text input, required (maxlength 200); gathered as 'nomineeName' and submitted via submitPublicLead('free_roof') (0a394536a8.js:9).
notes: Free-roof nomination entry form.

label: Homeowner's Phone (free-roof)
expected_behavior: tel input, required (maxlength 30); gathered as 'phone' and submitted via submitPublicLead('free_roof').

label: Homeowner's Email (free-roof, optional)
expected_behavior: email input, optional (maxlength 200); gathered as 'email'.

label: Which fits best? (free-roof category)
expected_behavior: Dropdown (Prefer not to say / Veteran / Widow / Fixed Income / Denied Claim / Other); gathered as 'category'.
notes: 6 options.

label: Property Address (free-roof)
expected_behavior: Text input, required (maxlength 500); gathered as 'address'.

label: Your Name (if nominating someone else)
expected_behavior: Text input, optional (maxlength 200); gathered as 'nominatorName'.

label: Your Relationship to Them (free-roof)
expected_behavior: Text input, optional (maxlength 100); gathered as 'nominatorRelation'.

label: Their Story (free-roof)
expected_behavior: Textarea, required (maxlength 1500); gathered as 'story'.

label: Honeypot (free-roof)
expected_behavior: Hidden off-screen honeypot; if filled, handler silently shows a fake success and resets the form without submitting (0a394536a8.js:16).
notes: Anti-spam; should never be filled by a human.

label: Submit Entry (free-roof)
expected_behavior: Submits the nomination: honeypot check, gathers fields, POSTs via submitPublicLead('free_roof'), disables button while sending, shows success/error in #fr-result and resets the form on success (0a394536a8.js:9).
notes: DANGER:send — writes a real public lead (free_roof kind). Drive only to confirm boundary.

label: (859) 420-7382 (free-roof closer)
expected_behavior: Opens the device dialer for (859) 420-7382 (tel: link, no JS).
notes: Also mailto:jd@nobigdealwithjoedeal.com on the same line, and 'Back to nobigdealwithjoedeal.com' link (line 347).
